title: Payment API timeout during peak traffic
description: Customers unable to complete payments. API returning 504 errors. Error rate spiked to 8.7% at 14:32 UTC.
root_cause: Database connection pool exhaustion under peak load. Pool size was set to 10, max connections reached.
resolution: Increased database connection pool size from 10 to 50. Optimized slow query on transactions table by adding composite index.

title: Auth service returning 401 for valid tokens
description: Multiple users reporting login failures despite correct credentials. Support queue spike detected.
root_cause: JWT signing key rotation script ran incorrectly, invalidating all existing active tokens.
resolution: Rolled back signing key to previous version. Re-issued affected tokens. Added validation step to key rotation script.

title: Database replication lag exceeded 120 seconds
description: Read replicas falling behind primary. Reporting queries returning stale data. Replication lag at 142s.
root_cause: Large batch migration job ran during business hours, overwhelming the replication thread.
resolution: Paused migration job, allowed replicas to catch up. Rescheduled migration to run during off-peak hours (02:00 UTC).

title: Notification service email delivery failure
description: Transactional emails not being delivered. Order confirmation and password reset emails queued but not sent.
root_cause: SMTP provider API key expired. Emails silently failing with 401 from the SMTP gateway.
resolution: Rotated SMTP API key. Replayed queued emails. Added API key expiry alerting.

title: Payment API high latency — gateway degraded
description: Payment API latency p99 at 1800ms. External gateway Stripe reporting degraded performance.
root_cause: Stripe payment gateway experiencing degraded performance in EU region. External incident on their side.
resolution: Switched traffic to secondary payment gateway (PayPal) for EU region. Reverted after Stripe recovered.

title: Auth service memory leak causing OOM restarts
description: Auth service pods restarting every 4-6 hours due to OOM kills. Memory usage growing unbounded.
root_cause: Token blacklist cache not being pruned. Expired tokens accumulating in memory indefinitely.
resolution: Added TTL-based eviction to the token blacklist cache. Deployed fix and monitored for 24h.

title: Database disk usage at 89% — critical threshold
description: Production database primary disk usage reached 89%. Alert threshold is 85%. Risk of outage if not addressed.
root_cause: Binary logs accumulating faster than retention policy was purging them. Log retention was set to 30 days.
resolution: Purged binary logs older than 7 days. Reduced log retention policy to 7 days. Added additional 500GB volume.

title: Payment API connection pool exhaustion — repeat incident
description: Second occurrence of connection pool exhaustion in 30 days. Timeout errors returning to customers.
root_cause: Traffic spike from marketing campaign exceeded capacity. Pool size of 50 (increased in INC-1001) still insufficient at 3x normal traffic.
resolution: Emergency scale-up of payment-api pods to 10 replicas. Pool size increased to 100. Auto-scaling policy added.

title: Notification service SMS gateway timeout
description: SMS notifications failing for 2FA codes. Users unable to complete MFA login.
root_cause: SMS gateway provider (Twilio) experiencing regional outage in EU.
resolution: Switched to backup SMS provider (AWS SNS) for EU region. Primary restored after 40 minutes.

title: Auth service slow response — database query regression
description: Auth service p99 latency increased from 95ms to 780ms after v2.4.1 deployment.
root_cause: New user lookup query in v2.4.1 missing index on email column in users table.
resolution: Added index on users.email column. Latency returned to baseline within 5 minutes.

title: Database primary failover — unplanned
description: Primary database server became unresponsive. Automatic failover triggered to replica. 4 minutes of downtime.
root_cause: Kernel OOM killer terminated the MySQL process due to memory pressure from concurrent analytical queries.
resolution: Promoted replica to primary. Separated OLTP and analytical query workloads. Added memory limits to analytical query users.

title: Payment API — fraud detection service timeout
description: Payment API latency spike caused by downstream fraud detection service taking >5s to respond.
root_cause: Fraud detection ML model retraining job running on the same instance as the inference service, starving CPU.
resolution: Separated training and inference workloads onto different instances. Added circuit breaker for fraud service with 2s timeout.

title: Notification service queue backlog — 50k messages delayed
description: Email notification queue grew to 50,000 unprocessed messages. Customers not receiving order confirmations.
root_cause: Consumer pod crashed and did not restart automatically due to misconfigured liveness probe.
resolution: Fixed liveness probe configuration. Deployed additional consumer pods. Queue drained within 45 minutes.

title: Payment API — certificate expiry causing SSL errors
description: SSL certificate for payment-api.company.com expired. Browsers showing security warning. Payments blocked.
root_cause: Auto-renewal of SSL certificate failed silently 30 days prior. Certificate expired at 00:00 UTC.
resolution: Manually renewed certificate. Implemented certificate expiry monitoring alert (30-day and 7-day warning).

title: Auth service — rate limiter blocking legitimate users
description: Rate limiter incorrectly flagging legitimate API consumers as abusive. Enterprise customers blocked.
root_cause: Rate limiter using IP-based limits. Enterprise customers sharing a NAT gateway IP were collectively exceeding per-IP limits.
resolution: Switched to API-key-based rate limiting for authenticated requests. IP-based limits retained only for unauthenticated endpoints.
